results.justification: EXACT TWIN — tier models request-job-task mappings + hierarchical scheduling + checkpoint propagation IS the 2-phase pinya-tronc-pom tier-rise scheduling mechanism.
MLA latent shared-attention + MoE bottleneck overlaps with shared-pinya-broadcast K-head weight-distributing mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — attention head safety + collapse-prevention IS the drop-detection coherence-fallback re-broadcast mechanism.
Multi-head shared-latent KV cache parallels pinya broadcast K-head shared state across upper-tronc layers.
EXACT TWIN — multi-stage inference RAG+prefill+decode pipeline with tier hierarchy IS the 2-phase build with stage-gating mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — hierarchical 3-tier memory plaintext+activation+parameter + integrated retrieval+scheduling IS the pinya+tronc+pom 3-tier hierarchical attention mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — asymmetric prediction safety Keys-vs-Values per head IS the asymmetric tier-gradient weight per pinya-tronc-pom layer.
Per-layer consistency check overlaps with per-layer drop-detection coherence score C_t mechanism.
